column1: "Children and grown-ups must do their best to keep the world clean", Mr. Fox (1) _____ to his class.
"Sometimes we (2) _____ rubbish in the streets, and we must pick it up.
Sometimes we (3) _____ sweets, and we must put the paper in the bin.
We must all work together to keep our nature clean. Never (4) _____ plastic into the water.
There's so much oil in the sea. If we (5) _____ poison into our rivers, ...
When you (7) _____ home from school, see if you can find examples of pollution in your area and write some sentences about it".
... and the tin (16) _____ full of oil!"
